name: Pink Lavender Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the distilled water and sugar. Heat until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add the hibiscus flowers (or hulled strawberries) to the saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the lavender leaves. Allow mixture to cool completely.
4. Strain the cooled liquid into a large pitcher or jar (if using strawberries, gently press juice from berries).
5. Add the remaining distilled water and lemon juice to the pitcher. Stir well.
6. Taste and add an additional 1/2 cup sugar if desired.
7. Just before serving, add ice cubes to the mixture. Pour into chilled glasses.
8. Garnish with fresh lavender flowers.
YIELD: 6-8 Servings
